mapper.sql: select p.permission_id as permissionId, p.project_id as projectId, pr.project_name as projectName, p.scope_type as scopeType, p.scope_id as scopeId, p.target_type as targetType, p.target_key as targetKey, p.can_view as canView, p.can_edit as canEdit, p.can_download as canDownload, p.can_delete as canDelete, p.inherit_flag as inheritFlag, p.start_time as startTime, p.end_time as endTime, p.create_by as createBy, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_by as updateBy, p.update_time as updateTime, p.remark from inf_project_permission_rel p left join inf_project pr on pr.project_id = p.project_id
